Package org.eventb.internal.ui.preferences

Class AbstractEventBPreferencePage

java.lang.Object
org.eclipse.jface.dialogs.DialogPage
org.eclipse.jface.preference.PreferencePage
org.eventb.internal.ui.preferences.AbstractEventBPreferencePage
All Implemented Interfaces:
org.eclipse.jface.dialogs.IDialogPage, org.eclipse.jface.dialogs.IMessageProvider, org.eclipse.jface.preference.IPreferencePage
Direct Known Subclasses:
AbstractFieldPreferenceAndPropertyPage
public abstract class AbstractEventBPreferencePage extends org.eclipse.jface.preference.PreferencePage
